mapper.insert: insert into ai_model (name, version, type, description, model_path, config_path, input_size, batch_size, confidence_threshold, enabled, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{version}, #{type}, #{description}, #{modelPath}, #{configPath}, #{inputSize}, #{batchSize}, #{confidenceThreshold}, #{enabled}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update ai_model set name = #{name}, version = #{version}, type = #{type}, description = #{description}, model_path = #{modelPath}, config_path = #{configPath}, input_size = #{inputSize}, batch_size = #{batchSize}, confidence_threshold = #{confidenceThreshold}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update ai_model set enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
